name: raycast-logseq-search
title: Raycast Logseq Search
description: Search your Logseq DB graphs straight from Raycast — real-time results as you type, a graph picker, and deep links that open the page back in Logseq.

name: logseq-reminders-sync
title: Logseq Reminders Sync
description: Two-way sync between prioritized Logseq tasks and Apple Reminders — completion, status, priority and due dates stay in step, with Logseq as the source of truth.

name: logseq-db-query-builder
title: Logseq DB Query Builder
description: A visual, point-and-click query builder for Logseq DB graphs, with nested filter groups and boolean logic — no Datalog by hand.

name: logseq-checklist
title: Logseq Checklist
description: A Logseq plugin that automatically adds live progress indicators to checklist blocks as you tick items off.

name: logseq-zotero-sync
title: Logseq → Zotero Sync
description: Tags any Zotero item that's referenced from a #zotero page in your graph, keeping your reference library and your notes in sync. Idempotent and safe to re-run.

name: logseq-http-server
title: Logseq HTTP Server
description: A small local server that exposes the Logseq CLI over HTTP, so other tools — like the browser extension — can query your graph without their own CLI setup.

name: logseq-updater
title: Logseq Updater
description: Automatically checks GitHub Actions for the latest Logseq development build and installs it, with version comparison and resumable downloads.
